# CBAMValid — Exporter Verification Preparation Pack V5

> CBAMValid is a production-grade verifier-preparation platform for non-EU producers, exporters, operators, importers, and CBAM reporting teams. It produces a serious operator-prepared dossier that reduces the work required for independent accredited verification under Regulation (EU) 2023/956 and Implementing Regulations (EU) 2023/1776, 2023/1778, and 2025/2546.

## Product & Deliverables
- [Homepage](https://cbamvalid.com/)
- [Product Overview](https://cbamvalid.com/product)
- [How It Works](https://cbamvalid.com/how-it-works)
- [Pricing](https://cbamvalid.com/pricing)
- [Sample Dossier Verification](https://cbamvalid.com/sample-dossier)
- [Public Document Verification](https://cbamvalid.com/verify)
- [Methodology & Technical Engine](https://cbamvalid.com/methodology)
- [CN-Code Scope Hub](https://cbamvalid.com/cn-code)

## Canonical Deliverable Contract (23 Components)
- **Primary Verifier Dossier PDF**: 14-page, 6-chapter structured PDF document organized into Chapter I (Executive), Chapter II (Readiness), Chapter III (Installation), Chapter IV (Evidence Lineage), Chapter V (Calculations), and Chapter VI (Handover & Annexes).
- **Interactive Verifier Workspace**: `Verifier Workspace.xlsx` multi-sheet navigation workbook.
- **Cryptographic Audit Trace**: `Calculation Trace.json` node hash tree.
- **Digital Integrity Manifest**: `Data Integrity Manifest.json` and KMS RSA signature `.sig` seal.
- **18 Technical Annexes & CSV Ledgers**: Source streams, emission sources, measurement meters, activity ledger, evidence matrix, methodology decision log, findings register, O3CI mapping.

## Regulatory Compliance Standard
- Built for **Definitive 2026 Reporting** under EU Regulation 2025/2546.
- Enforces strict fail-closed quality gates (100% evidence interval coverage, zero missing data, approved review status).
- Provides O3CI field-mapped structured data export for accredited verifier review.

## Legal Disclaimer
CBAMValid is operated independently. CBAMValid does not produce an accredited verification opinion or official registry XML submission.
Prepared for Independent Accredited Verification.
Last updated: 2026-07-21
